responsibilities: Supervise daily on-site construction activities to ensure work is performed in accordance with approved drawings and specifications
Conduct site layout and setting-out using total station and GPS equipment to establish accurate construction reference points
Perform quality control inspections of concrete, earthworks, and structural elements to verify compliance with project standards
Coordinate material testing and laboratory sampling to confirm soil, concrete, and asphalt meet specification requirements
Monitor construction progress against the project schedule and report delays or deviations to project management
Liaise with subcontractors, suppliers, and site personnel to resolve daily construction issues and maintain workflow
Maintain detailed site records, daily logs, and progress photographs to document construction activities and conditions
Enforce site safety protocols and conduct regular safety briefings to maintain compliance with OSHA regulations
